nodes.name: Black-billed amazon
nodes.summary: Black-billed amazon（Black-billed amazon，学名 Amazona agilis），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要威胁包括非法猎捕、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 非法猎捕
nodes.summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The black-billed amazon was once as common as the yellow-billed amazon, but has become much rarer due to deforestation and hurricane damage fragmenting its forest, poaching for food and the pet trade in wild parrots.{{ cite book | last=Collar | first=N.J
